# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-output.outputs.artifact-name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build
        
      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-output
        run: echo "artifact-name=app-${{ github.sha }}.tar.gz" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        
      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-output.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 7
          
  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          
      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment"
          # Add your staging deployment commands here
          # Example: ssh user@staging-server "cd /app && ./deploy.sh"
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          
  deploy-production:
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production environment"
          # Add your production deployment commands here
          # Example: ssh user@production-server "cd /app && ./deploy.sh"
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          
  security-scan:
    needs: [build, deploy-staging, deploy-production]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Run security scan
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2
        with:
          category: "/language:javascript"
          
      - name: Run dependency check
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=moderate
          
  cleanup:
    needs: [build, deploy-staging, deploy-production, security-scan]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning up temporary artifacts"
          # Cleanup steps if needed
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
